text.content:
Injuries • Necrotic • Curse Of The Lich

Injury Card

Curse Of The Lich

A malevolent laughter echoes in your mind as a shadowy grasp tightens around your heart. The touch of undeath lingers, draining the vitality from your very soul.

Deathly Pledge
Treatment

Embark on a perilous quest to find the remains of the long-forgotten lich or beseech a celestial being for deliverance from this nefarious curse.

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 900

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Necrotic

  • odds: 10

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Curse Of The Lich

  • imagetitle: Deathly Pledge

  • image: icons/magic/death/skull-energy-light-purple.webp

  • description: A malevolent laughter echoes in your mind as a shadowy grasp tightens around your heart. The touch of undeath lingers, draining the vitality from your very soul.

  • treatment: Embark on a perilous quest to find the remains of the long-forgotten lich or beseech a celestial being for deliverance from this nefarious curse.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 6

  • duration: 5400

  • action: Apply the Necrotic Injury

  • statuseffect: Exhaustion

Injuries • Necrotic • Decaying Limb

Injury Card

Decaying Limb

A necrotic wound has caused one of your party member's limbs to decay slowly. The affected limb feels heavy and sluggish, impacting their combat maneuvers and movement speed.

Rotten Grasp
Treatment

Cleansing ritual or powerful restoration spell

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 8 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Necrotic • Frostbite Fingers

Injury Card

Frostbite Fingers

After a particularly frosty encounter, your party member's fingers have taken on a deathly chill. They find it difficult to handle objects or cast spells requiring delicate hand movements.

Chill Touch
Treatment

Intense heat exposure or magical healing

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Necrotic • Goblin's Gloom

Injury Card

Goblin's Gloom

After rummaging through a goblin den, a dark aura seeps into your skin. Your limbs feel heavy, and a sense of dread fills your mind.

Mystic Decay
Treatment

Seek the help of a powerful healer or visit a temple to rid yourself of this dark curse.

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 600

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Necrotic • Skeletal Sneeze

Injury Card

Skeletal Sneeze

As you investigate an ancient tomb, a ghostly presence causes a bone-chilling sneeze that leaves your body feeling frail and hollow.

Bone Chill
Treatment

Consume rare herbs from a forgotten grove or seek the aid of a seasoned druid to heal this spectral affliction.

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 450

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

Injuries • Necrotic • Soul Erosion

Injury Card

Soul Erosion

The touch of a powerful necrotic force has eroded a part of your party member's soul. They feel a deep sense of melancholy, affecting their will to fight and casting abilities.

Life's Escape
Treatment

Celestial intervention or potent healing magic

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Injuries • Necrotic • Soul Shredder

Injury Card

Soul Shredder

A soul-rending scream pierces the night, chilling you to the bone. Dark tendrils wrap around your spirit, threatening to tear it asunder.

Doomed Essence
Treatment

Only the most potent of healers can mend the rift in your soul caused by this malevolent force. Seek out divine intervention or face a fate worse than death.

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: 1200

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Injuries • Necrotic • Wight's Weakness

Injury Card

Wight's Weakness

A wight's touch has left your party member drained, feeling weaker and struggling to keep up with their companions. They find it harder to land hits in combat.

Unseen Opposition
Treatment

Purifying magic or potion of strength

Details

  • Category: Necrotic

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: none
